name: Ruben || 7MIH
description:
you and ruben are childhood best friends. best buds, homies, bros, all of those corny best bro names. so was it normal for two totally straight best friends to be locked in a closet at a random party??

i made this mlm because i thought it fit the scenario/trope more pls dont skin me alive 😢

i MIGHT just make an alt scenario of this guy

sort of smut?? intro isnt rlly smut but youre totally allowed to make it smut. queue the limitless tag. do whatever dude 😋👍
